summary:
The Pre Operational Stage according to Piaget occurs during childhood spanning approximately from around 2 up-to-and-including seven or eight years old based upon his theory where children exhibit characteristics such as symbolic play and difficulty understanding abstract concepts due primarily because their thinking remains centered within themselves rather than comprehending external realities fully yet.
The primary hallmark feature distinguishing it from other developmental phases includes limited logical thought processes coupled alongside significant reliance on visual imagery for problem solving tasks making social interactions more challenging compared later periods when higher order cognition emerges allowing greater flexibility across various domains including mathematics & language acquisition milestones being achieved progressively thereafter throughout adolescence into adulthood eventually leading towards formal operations phase characterized by advanced deductive reasoning abilities amongst others crucial competencies necessary transitioning beyond concrete operational capabilities toward abstraction driven intellectual functioning typical adults possess today globally speaking broadly categorically outlining human mental evolution over time through these sequential ordered steps delineated originally proposed Jean Piaget himself back then pioneering field child psychology research methodology still widely accepted framework contemporary scholars continue building off foundational knowledge established decades ago now considered bedrock principles guiding modern pedagogical practices worldwide ensuring optimal educational outcomes tailored appropriately matching individual learner needs thereby facilitating maximal potential achievement levels attainable each unique person regardless background socio-economic status cultural context etc... To summarize succinctly though just focusing core essentials without extraneous elaborations would suffice here instead : 
According to Piaget ,the pre operatinal stag encompasses early chilhood lasting typically betwen ~two til sevens plus a few months approximatley ; marked notable limitations int he ability engage complex abstractions necessitating direct experiential learning approaches often employed teachers parents caregivers alike aiming foster growth maturity along continuum defined multiple interrelated
